nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: American Ornithological Society
nodes.summary: American Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联80种鸟类，包括黑頭鴨、绿翅雁、Chaco chachalaca等80种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rufous flycatcher
nodes.summary: Rufous flycatcher（Rufous flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus semirufus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 通贝斯大区
nodes.summary: 通贝斯大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括淡眉穴䳍、Peruvian plantcutter、Northern schiffornis等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 安卡什大区
nodes.summary: 安卡什大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括Peruvian plantcutter、灰白小霸鹟、Pied-crested tit-tyrant等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous flycatcher is found in northwestern Peru from Tumbes Department to Ancash Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous flycatcher is found in northwestern Peru from Tumbes Department to Ancash Department

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: For most of the length of its range it is found within of the coast. In addition, unconfirmed sight records in extreme southwestern Ecuador lead the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to class it as hypothetical in that country. It inhabits an arid landscape of thorn scrub, steppe, and areas of sparse grass with widely separated mesquite (Prosopis) and Acacia trees
